title: Introduction of Morse code
subtitle: Writing system
fact: Morse code is a telecommunications method which encodes text characters as standardized sequences of two different signal durations, called dots and dashes, or dits and dahs.

title: Introduction of Hangul
subtitle: Writing system
fact: The Korean alphabet is the modern writing system for the Korean language.

title: Introduction of Cyrillic script
subtitle: Writing system
fact: The Cyrillic script is a writing system used for various languages across Eurasia.

title: Introduction of Egyptian hieroglyphs
subtitle: Writing system
fact: Ancient Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language.

title: Introduction of cuneiform
subtitle: Writing system
fact: Cuneiform is a logo-syllabic writing system that was used to write several languages of the ancient Near East.

title: Introduction of Devanagari
subtitle: Writing system
fact: Devanagari is an Indic script used in the Indian subcontinent.
